text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Manhattan Cafe invites me to go on a
hike up a mountain.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It's easier to talk to my friend in the mountains...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I can tell her what's on my—

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Ngh... I told you to stop doing that!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Lately, my friend has been pinching my stomach
out of the blue...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
She does it while I'm in the middle of
conversation, too...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...If there's a reason you're doing this, just tell—

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Wait, where do you think you're going?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We make our way up the mountain, with
Manhattan Cafe speaking to her friend all the
while...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
She wanted to tell me... that I should do
something about my flabby tummy...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I think I'll keep hiking for a while, so she
won't pinch me anymore...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Manhattan Cafe is back on good
terms with her friend, and, after getting into
hiking, she manages to get back in shape, too.
